title: Support  - Poly Product Support screen color in light mode
scenario: Top box color mismatch on Product Support screen in light mode when navigating from Poly Lens Menu > Support in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure the app is in Light Mode (not Dark Mode).
3. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
6. Observe the top box on the Product Support screen.
expected: The top box on the Product Support screen should match the background color of the main body of the screen in Light Mode.
